name: diffwarden
description: A small CLI for agent-callable code review.

scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm build && INTEGRATION_TEST_ON=0 vitest run --config vitest.e2e.config.ts
scripts.test:live: pnpm test:live:sdk && pnpm test:live:cli && pnpm test:live:e2e
scripts.test:live:e2e: pnpm build && INTEGRATION_TEST_ON=1 vitest run --config vitest.live.config.ts test/live/e2e-live.test.ts
scripts.test:live:sdk: INTEGRATION_TEST_ON=1 vitest run test/cursor-adapter.test.ts test/claude-adapter.test.ts test/pi-adapter.test.ts test/droid-adapter.test.ts
